stories.headline: ‘Toy Story 5’ Looks To Cross $300M, ‘Supergirl’ Flying Low With $40M Opening – U.S. Box Office Update - Deadline
stories.summary: 'Toy Story 5' looks to cross $300M at U.S. box office this weekend, while 'Supergirl' is opening low with $40M stateside.

stories.headline: Jey Uso: ‘I really don’t care about the fans no more’ - Cageside Seats
stories.summary: Uso admits he’s confused and tries to take it back, but it sounds like he’s really fed up with WWE fans.

stories.headline: Donald Trump's Freedom 250 faces fresh humiliation as Vanilla Ice concert canceled - The Mirror US
stories.summary: Vanilla Ice was supposed to perform during Donald Trump's Great American State Fair on Friday, June 26, before the concert was canceled due to heavy rainfall in Washington, D.C.

stories.headline: Britney Spears' Sons Make Paris Fashion Week Runway Debut - TMZ
stories.summary: Britney Spears' sons, Sean Preston and Jayden Federline, are struttin' their stuff on the runway for Paris Fashion Week for the first time ... and showcasing two very different styles.

stories.headline: ‘The Bear’ Paid Tribute To Rob Reiner With Subtle Line In Series Finale - Deadline
stories.summary: As 'The Bear' closed its doors at FX on Hulu after five seasons, the series finale paid a subtle tribute to late star Rob Reiner.

stories.headline: Victoria Lee Robinson's Dad Files Restraining Order Against Tom Sandoval - TMZ
stories.summary: 3:26 PM PT -- Good news for Tom Sandoval ... Will Robinson's TRO has been denied until the court hearing. The court states it needs more information at a hearing before issuing an order.

stories.headline: Brad Pitt Tallies Win in Lawsuit Over Winery Fight With Angelina Jolie - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: The long-running case has peeled back the origins of Pitt and Jolie's divorce.

stories.headline: Scott Pelley signs major deal after '60 Minutes' firing - USA Today
stories.summary: Scott Pelley, who was fired from "60 Minutes" following a heated internal dispute, has signed a deal with talent agency Creative Artists Agency.
